about: DevOps & Platform Engineer with experience designing, deploying, and maintaining Kubernetes clusters at home and in production.
I build self-healing infrastructure, automate everything, and believe infrastructure should be version-controlled, repeatable, and boringly stable.
Currently running a 4-node k3s homelab with GitOps (ArgoCD), Longhorn storage, cert-manager, and full observability — because production should feel like home.

highlights: Manage production Kubernetes clusters serving 100k+ users
Designed GitOps workflow with ArgoCD reducing deployment time by 80%
Built observability stack serving 500k+ metrics series

projects.name: stack
projects.description: Home Kubernetes cluster managed entirely through GitOps
